parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending. Common: credit_date, vendor_credit_number, total, status, created_at

parameters.name: filter[status]
parameters.description: Filter by status (open, closed, void, etc.)

parameters.name: filter[credit_type]
parameters.description: Filter by credit type: restock, unstock, service, overpayment, rebate

parameters.name: filter[refund_method]
parameters.description: Filter by refund method: applied_to_bill, cash_refund, retained_credit

parameters.name: filter[purchase_order_id]
parameters.description: Filter by linked purchase order ID

parameters.name: filter[purchase_invoice_id]
parameters.description: Filter by linked purchase invoice (bill) ID
